texto: Have you strayed from the path leading to heaven? Then call on Mary, for her name means "Star of the Sea, the North Star which guides the ships of our souls during the voyage of this life," and she will guide you to the harbor of eternal salvation.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de St. Louis de Montfort que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Have you strayed from the path leading to heaven? Then call on Mary, for her name means "Star of …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, comfort, faith, com foco em faith e god.
